author: Killerbite95
install_msg:
APIv2 v1.0.0 installed!

Create your first API key: `[p]apiv2 key create mykey`
Check server status: `[p]apiv2 status`
name: APIv2
short: REST API server embedded in the bot for external integrations
description: Embeds an aiohttp REST API server inside the bot process, providing authenticated HTTP endpoints to control the bot from external services (websites, scripts, automations). Supports API key auth, rate limiting, and auto-discovery of loaded cogs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores API key hashes and access logs. No personal Discord user data is collected through the API.
